name: @gmode/e2e
description: End-to-end smoke tests for the GMode platform (live wrangler / gmode dev).

scripts.pretest: pnpm --filter @gmode/cli build && pnpm --filter @gmode/dashboard build && pnpm --filter create-gmode build
scripts.pretest:smoke: pnpm --filter @gmode/cli build && pnpm --filter @gmode/dashboard build && pnpm --filter create-gmode build
scripts.test: echo 'Run pnpm test:e2e:smoke for live smoke tests'
